title: RaveDAO (RAVE) Surges 54% to $15.58, Climbs to #29 Market Cap Ranking
excerpt: RaveDAO token has exploded with a remarkable 54.47% gain in 24 hours, pushing its price to $15.58 and securing a top-30 market cap position. The decentralized autonomous organization focused on music and entertainment continues to attract significant investor attention amid growing adoption.
